strengths: Meets 15+ year experience requirement with progression to Staff Engineer level at re:cinq
Demonstrates entrepreneurial leadership through 10-year GISCollective founder role
Currently engaged in AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP frameworks) showing emerging AI focus
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI/ML field—lacks preferred advanced degree specialization
No demonstrated products or platforms built with AI; current AI work is infrastructure-focused rather than product-strategy driven
No evidence of advising customers or partners on AI adoption, or recognized thought leadership in AI strategy

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated AI product/platform expertise
Recent AI infrastructure engagement at re:cinq
Missing advanced AI/ML degree and strategic experience

response.justification: Bogdan is a technically strong, generalist software craftsman with 15+ years of experience and entrepreneurial track record. However, the Principal Engineer role requires specialized AI strategy expertise, demonstrated AI product leadership, and thought leadership—areas where his background is limited. His current AI work at re:cinq focuses on agent infrastructure tooling rather than product or platform strategy. While he has the engineering fundamentals and shows directional interest in AI, he lacks the recognized AI expertise and strategic product experience this director-level role demands.
